_meta.provenance: Proposed by Code from the user's last-90d Hevy history (2026-05-26..07-13, 51 distinct titles). LLM-proposed; PENDING human confirmation (DECISIONS_LOG #74/#76). Run the seeder with --confirm to stamp human_confirmed + adjudicated_at.
_meta.three_states: Coverage is three-state (DECISIONS_LOG #76). `tags` = adjudicated → maps to N regions. `no_pattern` = adjudicated → demonstrates NO screenable taxonomy region (isolation, or a joint-level STRENGTH lift v0 has no axis for). A title absent from BOTH lists is untagged/unlooked → keyword fallback. G2: 100% of active-window templates adjudicated (tags + no_pattern), fallback hit-count 0 — achieved only after a --confirm seed.
_meta.how_to_use: Keyed by exact Hevy title (byte-exact — note U+2011/U+2013 in some titles). seed_exercise_region_tags.py resolves title -> hevy_exercise_templates.id (default-wins). region_key validated fail-closed vs engine/taxonomy.py. no_pattern entries persist (adjudicated_at + laterality, zero tag rows) ONLY on --confirm.
_meta.review_flags: Entries carrying a `note` are judgment calls — confirm before seeding. The no_pattern strength-lifts (calf, shoulder ER/IR, Copenhagen, hip add/abd) are BLOCKED on the v1 strength-ratio axis (OPEN_QUESTIONS Q27); no-pattern is the correct INTERIM verdict, not a permanent one.

tags.title: Bulgarian Split Squat (Dumbbell)
tags.note: keyword also fired `squat` — dropped; this is single-leg, not a bilateral squat

tags.title: Rack Pull
tags.note: keyword matched NOTHING (false negative) — genuine loaded hinge was unseen

tags.title: B‑Stance RDL
tags.note: title carries U+2011 non-breaking hyphen; b-stance = staggered/quasi-unilateral

tags.title: Face Pull
tags.note: scapular/rear-delt; horizontal_pull is the closest pattern — confirm

tags.title: Straight Arm Lat Pulldown (Cable)
tags.note: lat isolation, not a true vertical pull — secondary; confirm

tags.title: Cable Twist (Down to up)
tags.note: keyword matched NOTHING (false negative) — genuine loaded rotation was unseen

tags.title: Plank
tags.note: user has logged side-planks under this title too (see workout notes) — confirm this instance is a front plank

tags.title: Side Plank
tags.note: CORRECTION: keyword tagged trunk_stability_sagittal; side plank is frontal anti-lateral-flexion — a REAL region, so this stays a tag

tags.title: Cable Crunch
tags.note: spinal flexion, not anti-movement stability — secondary; candidate for no_pattern, confirm

no_pattern.title: Copenhagen Plank (Short Lever)
no_pattern.note: INTERIM. Adductor strength — frontal_single_leg_stability is closed-chain balance, anti_lateral_flexion is trunk; a side-lying adduction load demonstrates neither. Correct region is a hip-adductor STRENGTH axis that v0 lacks. Wrong→empty is a strict improvement (was mistagged trunk_stability_sagittal). BLOCKED on Q27.

no_pattern.title: Shoulder External Rotation
no_pattern.note: INTERIM. Cable ER is rotator-cuff STRENGTH; shoulder_mobility is a mobility screen (wrong capacity). REJECTED shoulder_mobility. Correct read is an ER:IR strength ratio v0 has no axis for (user ER:IR ~0.56 vs 0.66-0.75 ref — an active fortification target). Wrong→empty kills the false `rotation` (a _RADICULAR_BLOCKS region). BLOCKED on Q27.

no_pattern.title: Shoulder Internal Rotation
no_pattern.note: INTERIM. IR strength; pairs with ER for the ER:IR ratio (Q27). Same false-`rotation` neutralisation.

no_pattern.title: Calf Extension (Machine)
no_pattern.note: REJECTED calf→ankle_df: category error. Plantarflexion STRENGTH ≠ dorsiflexion MOBILITY, and tagging it ankle_df would mark a live Tier-B screening region as loaded on the exact opposite movement (same failure class as Shoulder-Rotation→rotation, and it would suppress ankle-DF probing). BLOCKED on Q27 (plantarflexion strength axis).

no_pattern.title: Standing Calf Raise (Machine)
no_pattern.note: REJECTED calf→ankle_df — as Calf Extension. Plantarflexion strength, no v0 axis.

no_pattern.title: Hip Adduction (Machine)
no_pattern.note: Open-chain frontal-hip adductor STRENGTH (pes-anserine-relevant). Not frontal_single_leg_stability (closed-chain stability). No v0 axis — the adductor:abductor ratio is a first-class Q27 read (HAGOS / adductor squeeze).

no_pattern.title: Hip Abduction (Machine)
no_pattern.note: Frontal-hip abductor strength; pairs with adduction for the adductor:abductor ratio (Q27).

no_pattern.title: Leg Extension (Machine)
no_pattern.note: Knee-extension isolation — no movement-pattern axis in v0.

no_pattern.title: Single Arm Rear Delt Cable Fly
